title: Nutty Crisp Brazilian Almond Crumble
description: An indulgent dish featuring a crisp almond crumble with Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese that is perfect for a dessert or snack, gluten-free and suitable for low FODMAP diets.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine almonds, melted butter, sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix well until the mixture is evenly coated with the ingredients.
Fold in the grated Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese into the almond mixture.
Add beaten egg whites to the bowl and gently fold them through the almond mixture until fully incorporated.
Transfer the mixture onto a greased baking dish or pan, spreading it out evenly.
Bake for 25 minutes in preheated oven. The crumble should be golden brown on top and crisp when lightly pressed with your finger.
